page_content:
JAPN201 Intermediate Japanese | (6 Credits)

Contemporary spoken and written Japanese.

Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in JAPN102; or or appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score.

JAPN202 Intermediate Japanese II (6 Credits)

Contemporary spoken and written Japanese.

Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in JAPN201; or appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score.
